metadata_information.title: Country Portfolios
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

document_description.abstract: Capital flows to developing countries are small and take mostly the form of loans rather than direct foreign investment. We build a simple model of North-South capital flows that highlights the interplay between diminishing returns, production risk and sovereign risk. This model generates a set of country portfolios and a world distribution of capital stocks that resemble those in the data.
